dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1000 Defense for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Charged Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: When Action Points are full, your Critical Severity is increased by 5000.

dbEquipBonuses.description: When Action Points are full, your Critical Severity is increased by 5000.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Action
dbEquipBonuses.description: When health is 50% or more, your Action Point Gain is increased by 7.5%. When health is below 50%, Stamina Regeneration is increased by 15%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Action
dbEquipBonuses.description: When health is 50% or more, your Action Point Gain is increased by 7.5%. When health is below 50%, Stamina Regeneration is increased by 15%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Remedy
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Max HP in a single blow, you gain 1% of your health back.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Remedy
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Max HP in a single blow, you gain 1% of your health back.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Tactical Daily (Greater)
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown). You gain 5% Combat Advantage.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Tactical Daily (Greater)
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown). You gain 5% Combat Advantage.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Tactical Daily (Greater)
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown). You gain 5% Combat Advantage.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 5% Defense for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Defender Strike
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain -1% Incoming Damage when you strike an enemy. Stacks 5 times. When you are struck, the stacks are consumed and you gain 1% Base Damage Boost per stack consumed for 10 seconds. Stacks cannot be applied at the same time.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Defender Strike
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain -1% Incoming Damage when you strike an enemy. Stacks 5 times. When you are struck, the stacks are consumed and you gain 1% Base Damage Boost per stack consumed for 10 seconds. Stacks cannot be applied at the same time.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Shielded Strength
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you have a Shield or Temp HP in Wildspace, gain 5% Damage and 2.5% Critical Severity. In non-Wildspace, the Damage bonus is reduced to 2%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Shielded Strength
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you have a Shield or Temp HP in Wildspace, gain 5% Damage and 2.5% Critical Severity. In non-Wildspace, the Damage bonus is reduced to 2%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Critical Harmony
dbEquipBonuses.description: You gain 1.5% Outgoing Healing for each player in your team. When your teammates are 20' or closer to you, their Critical Strike is increased by 2%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 5% Defense for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Max HP in a single blow, you gain 1% Power for 10s. (Max stack 5)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Maiden's Blade
dbEquipBonuses.description: You do 5% more damage to enemies that are not facing you. This bonus doubles in the Underdark.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Tenacity
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Max HP in a single blow, you gain 1% Critical Severity for 10s. (Max stack 5)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (10 second cooldown). Additionally, when Focused Daily triggers, you gain 2.5% Critical Severity for 10s.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1000 Defense for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Unbroken Strength
dbEquipBonuses.description: For each second you are at maximum health, gain +0.55% Power and +0.55% Critical Severity. Each second at less than maximum health, you lose 3 stacks. Max 10 Stacks: +5.5% Power and +5.5% Critical Severity.
